title: HPOM-009: Decision log — enforce durable decision records
description: Create scripts/validate_decisions.py that reads decisions.md and verifies each entry has required fields. Create DECISIONS.md active decision index. Ensure templates/decision.md matches required schema.
acceptance_criteria: validate_decisions.py parses shared/decisions.md and flags entries missing required fields
decision template includes: id, owner, reason, applies_to, date, supersedes, superseded_by
DECISIONS.md is a machine-readable index of active decisions
